mapper.sql: id, method, path, status_code AS statusCode, auth_type AS authType latency_ms AS latencyMs, created_at AS createdAt
mapper.select: SELECT FROM request_logs WHERE created_at BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM request_logs WHERE method = #{method} AND status_code = #{statusCode} AND created_at BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} ORDER BY created_at DESC
